api_key.description: OpenAQ v3 API key, sent as the X-API-Key header; never logged.

base_url.description: OpenAQ API base URL override for tests or proxies.

countries_id.description: Optional comma-separated OpenAQ country id filter, applied to every stream via the countries_id query parameter. Absent when unset (no filter).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
